01 — About the firm

Dependable manufacturing support, built for scale.

Jains Internationnal is a wovenwear garment manufacturer based in Tamil Nadu, India, specializing in apparel for men, women and kids — working with sourcing teams, merchandisers and apparel businesses that need scalable, reliable production.

Our focus is centred on transparent communication, structured production processes and long-term business partnerships. From shirts and dresses to pants and shorts, we support wovenwear development with customization flexibility, private-labelling solutions and quality-focused execution for export markets.

Sourcing & merchandising teams Export-focused execution Long-term partnerships
02 — Global reach

Actively exporting across North America, Europe, Asia & Australia.

From the USA to Australia, our garments reach merchandisers and brands across four continents. A proven track record of compliant, dependable export execution for international partners.

05 — Inside the floor

A focused floor of skilled hands.

A tightly run unit where cutting, stitching and finishing happen side by side, and every order is watched from first cut to packed carton.

CUTTING TABLE · FABRIC SPREAD
STITCHING LINE
THE TEAM AT WORK
FINISHING & PACKING
Cut

Fabric spread, marked and precision-cut in controlled lays for consistent panels.

Stitch

Operator lines build each style with in-line checks at every critical operation.

Finish

Pressed, QC-passed, labelled and packed to your packaging spec for export.
